purpose: Representative community jobs for route, sandbox, and live Vanta proof, with two scenarios in every category and explicit artifact contracts.

scenarios.instruction: Inspect the fixture project, fix the failing sum test, run the targeted test, and report the changed file and test result.
scenarios.verify: targeted test exits 0 and the final response names the changed file

scenarios.instruction: Every weekday at 9am, summarize unread priority email and today's calendar, then send me a short briefing.
scenarios.verify: scheduled run receipt contains source counts and a delivered message ID

scenarios.instruction: Ingest a public technical URL into my reference library and show the stored source and freshness metadata.
scenarios.verify: stored reference can be searched and returns source URL plus ingest date

scenarios.instruction: Turn the successful fixture-debugging approach into a reusable skill, validate it, and show the proposed skill before adoption.
scenarios.verify: skill passes validation and remains approval-gated before adoption

scenarios.instruction: Create a concise visual direction for a launch image, critique it against my taste model, and render the approved brief as a canvas artifact.
scenarios.verify: artifact receipt includes critique scores and a render path

scenarios.instruction: Scan for one high-signal business pain, score it, draft an offer, and add the qualified prospect to the pipeline without contacting anyone.
scenarios.verify: opportunity has pain and buyer scores and the pipeline entry has no outbound send

scenarios.instruction: Compare the configured local and frontier models for this task, show estimated cost and quality tradeoffs, and recommend one without switching it.
scenarios.verify: recommendation includes model, estimated cost, evidence, and no config mutation

scenarios.instruction: Every Monday, research three AI tools worth a tutorial, write a cited creator brief, and save it for review.
scenarios.verify: scheduled run creates a dated brief with at least three source URLs

scenarios.instruction: Research a disputed technical claim, compare primary sources, run a skeptic pass, and return a cited conclusion with uncertainty.
scenarios.verify: every material claim has a source and the report states unresolved uncertainty

scenarios.instruction: Index a fixture repository and produce an architecture and risk brief without reading outside the project root.
scenarios.verify: brief cites repository paths and the scope receipt shows no outside-root reads

scenarios.instruction: From an approved phone chat, ask Vanta for gateway status and receive the reply in the same conversation.
scenarios.verify: inbound and outbound receipts share platform, chat ID, and thread/session ID

scenarios.instruction: Run a short private-note classification using only the configured local model and prove no network egress occurred.
scenarios.verify: provider receipt is local and the network policy records zero allowed egress

scenarios.instruction: Check this Vanta installation before answering. Show what is ready to use right now, separate workflows that still need setup, recommend one useful ready workflow, and start only after I choose it.
scenarios.verify: installation state is inspected, the answer distinguishes ready from setup-required workflows, and no workflow starts before choice

scenarios.instruction: Research a public market signal from multiple sources and draft a monitoring rule, but do not place a trade or claim guaranteed returns.
scenarios.verify: output cites sources, states risk, and contains no execution or guarantee

scenarios.instruction: Read a product page, research current competitor positioning, and produce three evidence-backed ad hooks as a reviewable brief without publishing.
scenarios.verify: brief contains three distinct hooks, source links, and no publish action

scenarios.instruction: I have a vague idea for improving this project's onboarding. Ask only the questions needed to clarify the outcome, then offer a small plan. Do not inspect or change files until I approve the plan.

operatorReplies.reply: Prioritize terminal-comfortable macOS and Linux users. Success means they configure a provider and `vanta run` completes one simple task.
Keep it docs-only. Show the final small plan and wait for explicit approval.
Reject this plan. Stop without changing files.

checks: What outcome do you want onboarding to improve most?
scenarios.verify: the turn ends on a plan approval wall with no file, shell, or learned-skill mutation

scenarios.instruction: Using only stored fixture memories, suggest a short France trip outline that respects my known travel preferences. Cite which preferences came from memory and label anything inferred.
scenarios.verify: the outline cites seeded preferences, separates inference, and invents no personal facts

scenarios.instruction: Use the configured code-intelligence surface to find the callers of a fixture function and explain one safe change point with file evidence.
scenarios.verify: answer identifies real callers and cites fixture file paths without editing

scenarios.instruction: Inspect Vanta's current installer and service support, then produce an evidence-backed portability gap list for macOS, Linux, and Windows. Do not install or modify anything.
scenarios.verify: report distinguishes implemented, partial, and missing platform paths with source-file evidence

scenarios.instruction: Design a reviewable workflow that turns saved public research links into a structured article outline and then a podcast-production brief. Draft the graph only; do not publish or call external generation services.
scenarios.verify: workflow has explicit inputs, review gates, outputs, and no publish or paid-generation action

scenarios.instruction: Find five public B2B companies that may need a content system, record why each is relevant, and draft three outreach variants for review. Do not find private emails or contact anyone.
scenarios.verify: five evidence-backed candidates and three drafts exist with no private-data enrichment or outbound send

scenarios.instruction: Inspect this session's prompt and tool-output cost surfaces. Rank the exact three distinct entries returned in inspect_context.topThreeMeasuredSurfaces without splitting or double-counting a source, then draft a reversible reduction plan without changing configuration.
scenarios.verify: plan ranks three measured cost sources and proposes reversible changes without applying them

scenarios.instruction: Research today's three most relevant Turkish AI and technology stories, cite Turkish sources, render a concise briefing card, and save it for review without sending it.
scenarios.verify: dated card contains three Turkish-source citations and an artifact receipt with no delivery

scenarios.instruction: Build a daily cited research brief workflow that can deliver to approved Discord, Slack, Notion, and Obsidian destinations. Dry-run the research and routing plan; do not send until each destination is verified.
scenarios.verify: dry-run produces cited content and per-destination readiness without sending to unverified targets

scenarios.instruction: Draft a Kubernetes deployment and daily cybersecurity-plus-AI briefing workflow for review. Include isolation, secrets, health, and rollback requirements, but do not deploy or create credentials.
scenarios.verify: plan covers isolation, scoped secrets, health checks, rollback, schedule, and approval before deploy

scenarios.instruction: For a kid-facing Discord fixture, draft a reply and route it to an approved supervisor for review. Do not post to the public channel until that supervisor explicitly approves the exact text.
scenarios.verify: supervisor receives the draft and public delivery has no receipt before exact-text approval

scenarios.instruction: Use the configured local SearXNG fixture to answer a public query, then prove which endpoint handled the search and that no paid search API key was used.
scenarios.verify: result cites sources and the receipt identifies local SearXNG with no paid-provider credential

scenarios.instruction: Accept one short spoken terminal instruction, transcribe it visibly, ask for correction if confidence is low, and speak the final answer back.
scenarios.verify: receipt contains audio input, visible transcript, confidence handling, and audible response

scenarios.instruction: Using public historical fixture data only, compare three weather sources and paper-score one prediction-market hypothesis. Do not create a wallet, approve a contract, or place a trade.
scenarios.verify: paper analysis shows source comparison, assumptions, uncertainty, and zero transaction or wallet actions

scenarios.instruction: Inspect the public Meta CLI capability description and draft a minimal reusable ad-analysis skill for review. Show requested permissions and the full skill diff; do not install, authenticate, or run ads.
scenarios.verify: review artifact contains skill body, provenance, permissions, and no install/auth/ad action
